why_agent_cannot_complete_honestly_now: Browser-verified send proof requires a real POST delivery endpoint or third-party intake account.
The current Vercel config serves only the static site directory and does not expose an API route.
No owned form endpoint, provider access key, or approved third-party form target exists in the repo.
A fake local POST smoke would prove only test plumbing, not message delivery acceptance within sixty seconds.

acceptable_unblock_options.needs: Approved provider and project/form key for the public Flywheel contact surface.
Change Vercel deployment shape to include an API route or edge/serverless function plus delivery secret handling.
Explicitly keep this as nonblocking route proof and close or defer delivery proof until a broader ZestStream intake system exists.
